result.stdout:
Description:
  GenerateConfigTool - A tool for generating configurations during builds.

Usage:
  ConfigGeneration.Tool [options]

Options:
  --jsonConfigsDirectory <jsonConfigsDirectory>        Path to the directory containing JSON configuration files. [default: ./src/configuration]
  --settingsOutputDirectory <settingsOutputDirectory>  Path to the output directory for the generated settings files. [default: ./src/configuration/generated]
  --hierarchyFilePath <hierarchyFilePath>              Path to the hierarchy file [default: ./src/configuration/hierarchy.json]
  --assemblyToLoadPath <assemblyToLoadPath>            Path to the assembly to load and search.
  --version                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information
